title: VPN keeps dropping, cannot work
description: Since this morning my VPN disconnects every few minutes and I cannot reach internal sites. This is blocking my work.

title: Office printer jams on every duplex job
description: The 3rd floor printer jams whenever I print double-sided. Single-sided is fine.

title: Cannot send email to external addresses
description: Internal email works but anything to an external domain bounces back immediately.

title: Locked out of my account after MFA reset
description: I reset my MFA device yesterday and now I am completely locked out and urgent, I have a deadline.

title: CRM throws a 500 error on save
description: Saving any record in the CRM app returns a 500 error. Export also does nothing.

title: Wifi is slow in the east building
description: Connection is intermittent and slow in the east building conference rooms.

title: Need help, something is broken
description: I cannot get my work done, please help. Not sure which system is at fault.
